_comment: Parallel Execution Strategy - Execute independent agents concurrently
description: Parallel execution runs independent agents concurrently to minimize latency.
advantages: Minimized latency (max of agent times, not sum)

max_concurrent.description: Maximum number of agents to run concurrently

wait_for_all.description: Wait for all parallel agents to complete (false = return on first completion)

timeout_per_agent.description: Timeout in seconds for each agent execution

fail_on_first_error.description: Cancel all agents if any one fails

collect_all_results.description: Collect results from all agents, even if some fail

worker_pool_size.description: Size of the async worker pool

best_practices: Ensure agents are truly independent (no shared state)
Set appropriate max_concurrent based on available resources
Use timeouts to prevent hanging agents
Implement proper error handling for partial failures
Monitor resource usage (CPU, memory, API rate limits)
